mcp:tool-listener.toolDescription: List all patients from both CareStack and Meditab EHR systems. Returns normalized patient demographics including name, birthDate, gender, address, and source system (CareStack or Meditab).
Get all conditions and diagnoses for a specific patient. Returns conditions with ICD-10 codes, display names, and onset dates. Use patient IDs with prefix cs- (CareStack) or mt- (Meditab).
Search for patients with a specific condition across both EHR systems. Accepts ICD-10 codes (e.g., E11.9 for Type 2 Diabetes) or SNOMED codes. Returns all matching conditions with patient IDs.
Get laboratory test results for a specific patient. Returns lab values with LOINC codes, numeric values, units, and dates. Includes blood work like A1c (4548-4), glucose, cholesterol panels.
Get active medication requests for a specific patient. Returns medication names, RxNorm codes, dosage instructions, status, and date written.
Get allergy and intolerance records for a specific patient. Returns allergen substance, category (food/medication/environment), criticality (low/high), reaction details, and clinical status.
Discover connected FHIR R4 EHR servers and their capabilities. Returns server name, FHIR version, software info, and total supported resource types for each connected system.
Check the health status of the Healthcare Clinical Intelligence API and all downstream dependencies.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: #[output application/json --- { status: "healthy", api: "Healthcare Clinical Intelligence MCP Server", version: "1.0.0", tools: 8, transport: "Streamable HTTP" }]
